title: Why work with me
summary: I bring systems thinking, technical depth, and a focus on alignment: your product strategy and your technical choices should support each other. No black boxes, no hype—clear architecture and delivery you can count on.
content:
1. Reduce risk and cost by clarifying structure, dependencies, and roadmap before scaling.
  2. Get technical decisions that match business goals—architecture and product aligned.
  3. Ship with consistency: performance, reliability, and maintainability built in.
  4. One senior partner for strategy and execution—no handoff theatre.
  5. Technical debt tackled in a prioritised way, not ignored or rewritten blindly.
